text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 214 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_INNPP_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Split Network Standard Retail — Number of Days in Two-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a two-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy within a split 
network) during the pre-initial coverage limit
